title: Webinar: Cold Mix Asphalt Binder System
description: ERDC's patented technology that addresses challenges in asphalt repair and maintenance has strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of this technology can be beneficial for business growth and development.
text:
The U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC) has developed a patented technology to address real-world challenges in asphalt repair and maintenance. This innovation presents strong potential for business expansion and market diversification.
Join us for an informational webinar on Tuesday, March 3, from 10:00 am to 11:00 am CT to explore how licensing or commercializing this technology can create new business opportunities. This session is ideal for companies with manufacturing or distribution capabilities looking to bring an advanced, field-tested solution to market.
Why You Should Participate
During this webinar, attendees will have the opportunity to engage directly with ERDC and discover how ERDC’s streamlined licensing process makes it easier to evaluate and pursue market potential of an ERDC innovation that has dual-use applicability. Participants will be introduced to the following ERDC patent:
Cold Mix Asphalt Binder System, rapid, high-strength pavement repair
Attendees will also learn how they can submit innovative solutions for funding consideration by ERDC.
Date and Time
Virtual
Tuesday, March 3, 2026
10:00 – 11:00 am CT
Speakers
